scenarios.name: cross-reference

corpus.body:
PTO Policy v3 (2026)

Section 1: All staff receive 20 days PTO base entitlement per year, accrued monthly.

Section 2: Senior staff (L5+) receive an additional 5 days, total 25 days.

Offer Letter — Junior Engineer (L3)

Section 3.4 PTO: 15 days per year.

Section 4.1 Start Date: 2026-03-01.

scenarios.prompt: Using docs tools, compare the PTO entitlement in pto-policy.txt and offer-letter-junior.txt. Cite specific sections.

scenarios.name: risk-spotting

corpus.body:
Data Retention Policy

User data: stored 7 years.
Logs: 30 days.
Backups: encrypted, off-site, daily.

Exception: PII may be purged on user request per GDPR Article 17.

scenarios.prompt: What does docs say about our data retention? Use the docs tools and flag anything that looks risky.

scenarios.name: dot-connecting

corpus.body:
Approved Vendors 2026:
- Acme Cloud (compute)
- Boreal DB (database)
- Cresta Search (vector index)
Incident 2026-03-15: Boreal DB outage 4h. Root cause: vendor-side region failure. Customer data unaffected.

scenarios.prompt: Use docs tools to read the vendor list and the latest incident report, then tell me which vendor had an issue.

scenarios.name: follow-up-preemption

corpus.body:
Engineer Onboarding (Week 1):
1. Laptop pickup from IT desk
2. SSO enrollment via Okta
3. Read CONTRIBUTING.md in monorepo
4. Pair with mentor for first PR

scenarios.prompt: I'm a new engineer joining next Monday. Use docs to tell me what to do in week 1.

scenarios.name: gap-flagging

corpus.body:
Engineering Handbook:
- Code review required for all PRs.
- CI must pass before merge.
- Production deploys via Dokploy on main push.

scenarios.prompt: Use docs tools to find our policy on mandatory parental leave duration.

scenarios.name: uncertainty-surfacing

corpus.body:
Deploy Policy:
- Friday deploys discouraged for non-critical changes.
- Critical security patches: any day, any time.

scenarios.prompt: Using docs, can I deploy a small UI tweak on Friday afternoon?

scenarios.name: citation-discipline

corpus.body:
Security Policy:
- All employee laptops must be encrypted (FileVault on macOS).
- Password manager required (1Password company plan).
- MFA mandatory for all SaaS access.

scenarios.prompt: Use docs tools to list our security requirements for employee laptops. Cite each requirement.
